news.summary: Armstrong World Industries, a prominent company in the Americas known for creating interior and exterior architectural applications, is set to announce its first-quarter 2025 results on Tuesday, April 29 before the market opens. The company, listed on the NYSE under the symbol AWI, specializes in ceilings, specialty walls, and exterior metal solutions. Following the release of their financial results, a conference call will be held at 10:00 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss the outcomes. An opportunity to join the discussion through a live webcast of the conference call and presentation will also be available.
news.headline: Armstrong World Industries (NYSE: AWI) to report first-quarter 2025 results on April 29 before market opens. Conference call at 10:00 a.m. ET.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, Omnitron Sensors, a leading company in MEMS fabrication IP, has named Dr. Ijaz Jafri as their new Vice President of Engineering. Dr. Jafri has over 20 years of experience in launching innovative MEMS and semiconductor technologies in various industries such as automotive, industrial, aerospace, defense, and consumer sectors. With a strong background in technology and managerial leadership, Dr. Jafri will be responsible for guiding Omnitron's engineering strategies moving forward.
news.headline: Omnitron Sensors appoints Ijaz Jafri as VP of Engineering, boasting 20+ years of experience in MEMS tech.
JPMorgan now expects back-to-back interest rate cuts from ECB in the next four meetings to reach a terminal rate of 1.5%.
China's Premier Li: China is fully capable of hedging against adverse external influences - Xinhua.

China's Premier Li: China's resolute measures are not only to safeguard its sovereignty, security and development interests, but also to defend international trade rules and international fairness and justice - Xinhua.

news.summary: In response to the recent surge in COVID-19 cases, authorities have announced new restrictions across the country. Over 10,000 new cases were reported in the last 24 hours, bringing the total number of active cases to 75,000. To combat the spread of the virus, gatherings of more than 50 people are now banned, and all businesses must operate at 50% capacity. The government has allocated $5 million for healthcare facilities and is urging the public to follow all safety guidelines. With the healthcare system already under strain, these measures are deemed necessary to control the situation.
news.headline: Douglas DelGrosso is nominated by ITT for election to the Board of Directors.
South Korea acting president Han held phone call with US president Trump - Yonhap.
China's Premier Li: China's macroeconomic policies this year have fully taken into account various uncertainties and have sufficient reserve policy tools - Xinhua.

news.summary: Based in Broomfield, Colorado, Conga, the leading provider in Revenue Lifecycle Management (RLM), has recently entered into a multi-year strategic collaboration agreement with Amazon Web Services (AWS). This partnership aims to enhance Conga's product development on AWS, enabling customers to leverage AWS's advanced cloud technologies. By modernizing workflows, automating crucial business functions, and minimizing manual intervention, this collaboration is set to drive innovative business solutions.
news.headline: Conga signs multi-year collaboration agreement with AWS to develop products on their advanced cloud technologies.

news.summary: A new product called the STPS500 Series PyroFuse has been introduced by Sensata in SWINDON, United Kingdom. This pyrotechnic circuit breaker is specifically designed for high-voltage applications to provide swift and dependable protection. The STPS500 Series PyroFuse aims to enhance safety and efficiency in electric vehicles as well as other high-voltage systems.
news.headline: Sensata Technologies introduces STPS500 Series PyroFuse as a rapid and reliable pyrotechnic circuit breaker for high-voltage safety.

news.summary: In Miami, Karrier One Inc., a prominent provider of Web3-fueled telecom services, has recently partnered with AT&T Mobility LLC to bolster Wi-Fi offload capabilities both domestically and internationally. This collaboration aims to expedite the integration of decentralized physical infrastructure networks (DePIN) to advance next-gen wireless connectivity. Per the agreement, Karrier One will grant AT&T Mobility and its users entry to an extended array of Wi-Fi offload sites supported by Hotspot 2.0/Pass.
news.headline: Karrier One partners with AT&T to expand Wi-Fi offload coverage, advance decentralized connectivity. More Hotspot 2.0/Pass locations available.

news.summary: A highly experienced industry professional with more than 35 years of expertise has joined Truework to help advance the company's goal of revolutionizing income and employment verification. Truework, a prominent technology company specializing in verification services, revealed this update from San Francisco on April 8, 2025.
news.headline: Randy Lightbody appointed as Head of Mortgage at Truework to enhance verification solutions for lenders.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, in San Francisco, Five to Flow, a consulting firm focusing on integrating human and AI organizational wellness solutions, revealed a new partnership with a top UK technology company. This alliance aims to aid Aspire Oxford, a nonprofit organization dedicated to addressing specific issues.
news.headline: Five to Flow partners with global tech leader to support Aspire Oxford in combating homelessness and unemployment.

news.summary: A recent survey conducted on a sample of 1,000 adults revealed that individuals who consume cannabis daily tend to snack more frequently than non-consumers, leading to increased feelings of guilt. However, the survey also highlighted that these cannabis users are making conscious efforts to opt for healthier snack choices. The study was conducted in Tustin, California and was published on April 8, 2025. The findings challenge the common stereotype of the "junk-food loving stoner," emphasizing a shift towards healthier eating habits among cannabis users.
news.headline: Survey of 1,000 adults finds daily cannabis users snack more but strive for healthier options; pushing back against junk-food stereotype.

news.summary: A recent study found that 53% of individuals are most frustrated by website search challenges when using self-service options. This highlights the significant demand for integrated AI-powered search solutions. On April 8, 2025, Coveo (TSX: CVO), a leading provider of AI-Relevance technology, based in Montreal, London, and New York, emphasized the importance of delivering AI-driven search capabilities to address this issue.
news.headline: Coveo CX Relevance Report shows 84% of customers face issues getting relevant help, with 53% struggling with website search.

news.summary: The article discusses how ChatGPT can analyze crypto news headlines to generate trade signals for traders. It emphasizes the importance of combining these signals with broader market context for effective trading decisions. It guides users on how to use ChatGPT to analyze news and spot opportunities, emphasizing that AI is a tool and not a foolproof solution. The guide provides steps on how to gather crypto news, craft prompts, and ask questions to ChatGPT for trade signals. It highlights the need for testing and refining AI suggestions, mentioning limitations and risks associated with using AI tools for crypto trading. The example provided in the article revolves around analyzing a news headline about Pi Network's price nearing all-time lows, with ChatGPT offering sell signals due to increased supply and bearish factors. The article also warns users about market volatility, overreliance on AI, technical issues, and security risks while offering tips for successful AI-powered trading, such as being specific, cross-checking analysis, managing risk, starting small, diversifying signals, and setting stop-loss limits. It concludes by encouraging readers to practice using ChatGPT with fresh headlines to enhance their trading skills while cautioning that ChatGPT is not a financial advisor and that traders should assess their risk tolerance before acting on AI-generated insights.
news.headline: Use ChatGPT to analyze crypto news for trade signals. Craft clear prompts for accurate responses. Combine AI insights with market context for better decisions. Verify with research before trading. #CryptoTrading #ChatGPT

news.summary: In Chicago, CCC Intelligent Solutions Inc. unveiled its Crash Course Q1 2025 Report, focusing on the changing U.S. vehicle fleet's impact on auto claims and repairs. The report delves into trends such as the aging vehicle fleet, repair complexities with EVs and hybrids, ADAS-related challenges, and increasing casualty concerns. CCC is a top cloud platform provider for the P&C insurance industry, providing insights into the industry. This report sheds light on vital issues affecting the sector.
news.headline: CCC's Crash Course Q1 2025 Report discusses the U.S. vehicle fleet changes affecting auto claims and repair.

news.summary: San Francisco-based company Eventbrite is debuting a unique series of mashup events, starting with the Cheese Rave in New York City. This innovative concept combines artisanal cheese tasting with electronic dance music for a truly unique sensory experience. Celebrity culinary expert Antoni Porowski is joining forces with Eventbrite to introduce the Cheese Rave. This event aims to bring together seemingly unrelated passions and offer attendees an unforgettable live experience. Stay tuned for more mashup events from Eventbrite in the future.
news.headline: Eventbrite introduces Cheese Rave, blending cheese tasting and EDM in NYC with Antoni Porowski. Event aims to merge culinary and club cultures.

news.summary: Herc Holdings Inc., listed on the NYSE as HRI, is set to unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on April 22, 2025, before the market opens. An investor conference call is scheduled for 8:30 a.m. ET following the release. During the call, company management will analyze the results and potentially disclose significant business, financial, or other details not included in the initial press release. Interested parties can access a live webcast of the event at the provided link.
news.headline: Herc Holdings (NYSE: HRI) to report Q1 2025 results on April 22, 2025, followed by 8:30 a.m. ET investor call. Webcast available.

news.summary: In Ankeny, Iowa, Casey’s (NASDAQ: CASY) is offering a special deal to help Americans save money this Tax Day. On April 15, guests who are Rewards members can purchase any large pizza and receive a free large one-topping pizza as a Pizza Refund. The refund can be redeemed within 21 days of Tax Day. While the IRS may take 21 days to issue tax refunds, Casey’s is providing a delicious incentive for customers to enjoy.
news.headline: Casey’s offers Tax Day deal: Buy large pizza, get free one-topping pizza within 21 days. Save dough with Pizza Refund.

news.summary: In Duluth, Georgia, Asbury Automotive Group, Inc. (NYSE: ABG), a prominent automotive retail and service firm in the U.S., has released its 2024 Corporate Responsibility Report outlining its Environmental, Social, and Governance (“ESG”) strategies. The report emphasizes the company’s commitment to becoming the most customer-focused automotive retailer and highlights the crucial role of its team members in driving ESG initiatives. The report underlines Asbury Automotive Group's dedication to ESG goals and the essential role played by its workforce.
news.headline: Asbury Automotive Group publishes 2024 Corporate Responsibility Report showcasing ESG commitments. (Count: 106)

news.summary: In San Francisco, Grove has recently debuted a new television commercial and marketing strategy to engage a larger audience and highlight its increased commitment to environmental and human health. The company aims to expand its reach and promote its dual focus on promoting both environmental sustainability and human well-being.
news.headline: Grove launches new connected TV ad, targeting 57M consumers focusing on environmental and human health.

news.summary: hc1 unveiled their suite of Operational Excellence solutions in Indianapolis today, revolutionizing laboratory efficiency and performance. This innovative offering converts lab data into actionable insights and streamlines workflows. By doing so, hc1 Operational Excellence enables health systems and commercial labs to lower costs, enhance efficiency, and elevate diagnostic quality and service during a patient’s care path. This initiative positions the lab as a crucial strategic asset in healthcare.
news.headline: hc1 introduces Operational Excellence solutions for labs, boosting efficiency and quality. Reduces costs, increases efficiency.

news.summary: In Troy, Michigan, a recent study by J.D. Power revealed that health insurers are facing a significant challenge due to their poor member digital experience. The research highlighted that the shortcomings in this area are having a substantial impact on the industry. The study identified key issues related to customer satisfaction and ease of online interactions. It emphasized the urgent need for health insurers to enhance their digital platforms to better serve members. This insight underscores the importance of addressing these deficiencies promptly, as they directly influence the overall performance of health insurers.
news.headline: Poor member digital experience negatively impacts health insurers, as per J.D. Power, influencing customer satisfaction.

news.summary: In Seattle (NASDAQ: RDFN), recent data from Redfin revealed that 20% of potential homebuyers plan to liquidate stocks to aid in their next down payment. Among current homeowners, approximately 13% have sold stocks to assist with their down payment, while 10% have utilized stocks to cover mortgage costs. Conversely, renters show less inclination to rely on stock liquidation for housing expenses.
news.headline: 1 in 5 homebuyers plan to sell stocks for down payment, 13% homeowners did; 10% sold for mortgage. (incl. Redfin survey)

news.summary: In Ann Arbor, Michigan, Plinqit, a provider of high-yield automated savings solutions, is marking a significant achievement as deposits from its High Yield Savings product have exceeded $3 billion. To further aid financial institutions in boosting deposit growth, Plinqit has unveiled a revamped website. The success of Plinqit underscores its effectiveness in assisting banks in attracting and retaining deposits amidst fierce competition.
news.headline: Plinqit achieves $3B in deposits, introduces new site. Aids banks in boosting deposit growth amid competition.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, COPE Health Solutions revealed that their population health platform, Analytics for Risk Contracting (ARC), has received HITRUST r2 Certification. This signifies the company's dedication to maintaining top-tier security, privacy, and compliance standards for their health plan and provider clients who leverage ARC to enhance quality scores, revenue, market share, and profitability. This achievement highlights COPE Health Solutions' position as a national leader in value-based care enablement.
news.headline: COPE Health Solutions' ARC platform achieves HITRUST r2 Certification, ensuring security for health clients.

news.summary: Houston-based company Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) has unveiled an update to its HPE Aruba Networking Central service. This network management solution, powered by AI and prioritizing security, now offers new deployment choices. These include a virtual private cloud (VPC) for customers needing cloud agility while maintaining stringent data security and regulatory compliance. Additionally, an on-premises option is available, ensuring operation even when disconnected from the cloud. HPE's expansion provides increased flexibility for users.
news.headline: HPE launches new deployment options for HPE Aruba Networking Central, including VPC and on-premises for enhanced data security.

news.summary: Canadians across the country have a chance to participate in the casting process until April 30, 2025 for the inaugural Canadian version of a popular show, produced by Insight Productions in Toronto. Paramount+ revealed the exciting news, inviting eager participants to apply for the opportunity. The casting call signifies a significant milestone for the show's first venture into the Canadian market.
news.headline: Canada's first-ever MTV Shore format “Canada Shore” casting opened until April 30, 2025. Produced by Insight Productions.

news.summary: In Atlanta, FINEOS Corporation Ltd (ASX FCL) and Sutherland have partnered to revamp absence and leave management for U.S. employee benefit carriers. FINEOS, known for core systems for insurers, and Sutherland, a top business and digital transformation leader and insurance TPA, aim to redefine this area amid changing regulations, workforce dynamics, and customer demands. The collaboration seeks to empower insurers dealing with these challenges, providing them with innovative solutions.
news.headline: FINEOS and Sutherland partner to transform absence solutions for U.S. carriers, aiming to redefine leave management, helping insurers navigate regulatory challenges, and improve customer experience.

news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, on April 8, 2025, "The Sky Was on Fire: Ballet & War in Ukraine" is set to debut at the Florida Film Festival on April 16, 2025, followed by a second screening on April 20. This documentary showcases the power of art in the face of adversity and tells the story of resilience amidst conflict.
news.headline: World Premiere of The Sky Was on Fire: Ballet & War in Ukraine at Florida Film Festival on April 16, 2025, with encore on April 20.

news.summary: SAMI chat utilizes artificial intelligence to provide prompt, context-specific responses to enhance efficient decision-making. Recently in Boston on April 8, 2025, eschbach, a renowned global software developer, announced its achievement as the developer of the Shiftconnector® enterprise manufacturing platform for process manufacturing.
news.headline: SAMI Chat by eschbach is the latest in AI for process manufacturing, offering real-time, context-aware answers.

news.summary: In New York, a new company called AI One, developed in collaboration with Nadia Partners, has emerged from stealth mode to address a major issue confronting businesses. Many enterprises are struggling with outdated systems, complex data strategies, and increasing expenses, limiting their potential for growth. AI One aims to provide a solution by avoiding traditional data lake setups, enabling organizations to swiftly leverage their current data resources, and reinvest cost savings into revenue growth opportunities. This initiative seeks to streamline operations and drive business success.
news.headline: AI One launched to solve data challenges, bypass data lakes, and save costs. Partnered with Nadia Partners, it offers transformative solutions for enterprises to unlock immediate value from existing data.

news.summary: Enhancements have been made to accommodations, dining options, and other amenities to enhance the guest experience in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. The renovations were completed by Playa Hotels & Resorts N.V., a prominent owner and operator of all-inclusive resorts in Mexico. The improvements were unveiled on April 8, 2025. Playa Hotels & Resorts N.V. is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol PLYA.
news.headline: Playa Hotels renovates Hyatt Ziva Puerto Vallarta with multimillion-dollar upgrades, enhancing guest experience. #PlayaHotels

news.summary: In a significant move, Ripple, a key player in digital asset infrastructure for financial institutions, has revealed the acquisition of Hidden Road for a substantial $1.25 billion. This deal stands out as one of the biggest in the digital assets sector. Through this acquisition, Ripple achieves a notable milestone by becoming the inaugural cryptocurrency firm to possess and manage a global, diversified prime brokerage. Hidden Road, acknowledged as one of the rapidly expanding prime brokers internationally, caters to institutions by providing a comprehensive range of services.
news.headline: Ripple to buy prime broker Hidden Road for $1.25B, making Ripple the first crypto firm to own a global prime broker.

news.summary: Obsidian Sensors recently revealed their latest thermal imaging sensor with a higher resolution of SVGA (800x600) on a 17um pixel pitch. These new sensors were produced on sizeable glass substrates at Obsidian’s manufacturing ally, Innolux, located at its T3 LTPS facility in San Diego.
news.headline: Obsidian Sensors announces SVGA thermal imaging sensor (800x600) on 17um pixel pitch, progressing towards HD res.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Bloomfire, the AI-driven knowledge management platform, unveiled a report titled "The Value of Enterprise Intelligence." The report examined data from 10,000 of its customers spanning 115 firms over six months. The study found that suboptimal knowledge management processes can affect around 25% of a company's yearly revenue. For instance, for a Fortune 500 company with a $9 billion annual income, this could mean a substantial loss of approximately $2.4 billion.
news.headline: Report by Bloomfire shows Enterprise Intelligence adoption can lead to $2.4B opportunity from $9B annual revenue loss.

news.summary: The latest offering from a well-known power tool brand includes the innovative Bulldog Xtreme8™ SDS-plus concrete drill bits and Blue Xtreme™ carbide-tipped drill bits, designed to provide superior durability and reliability. A groundbreaking achievement, the Bulldog Xtreme8™ marks the world's first 8-cutter SDS-plus concrete drill bit available to consumers. This new release highlights the brand's dedication to introducing cutting-edge tools to the market.
news.headline: Bosch debuts 8-Cutter SDS-Plus Concrete Drill Bit, lasting 4X longer in concrete. Bulldog Xtreme8™ is world's first.

news.summary: In Beaverton, Oregon, the UALink Consortium has approved the UALink 200G 1.0 Specification. This specification establishes a high-bandwidth, low-latency interconnect for communication between accelerators and switches in AI computing pods. The UALink 1.0 Specification allows for a scale-up connection of 200G per lane, accommodating up to 1,024 accelerators in an AI computing pod. This open standard interconnect is designed to enhance next-generation AI cluster performance.
news.headline: UALink Consortium releases Ultra Accelerator Link 200G 1.0 Spec, enabling 200G per lane connection for up to 1,024 accelerators in AI pod.

news.summary: Bristol, England – StorMagic has recently named Susan Odle as its new CEO and board member.
news.headline: StorMagic names Susan Odle as CEO to drive innovation and growth in Bristol, England.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, ProofPilot, a prominent Clinical Experience Platform (CXP), shared that Joseph Kim, the Chief Strategy Officer, has been selected for the Leadership Council for the Society for Clinical Research Sites (SCRS). This appointment marks a significant achievement for Kim and showcases ProofPilot's continued industry influence.
news.headline: Chief Strategy Officer Joseph Kim from ProofPilot joins Society for Clinical Research Sites' Leadership Council on April 8, 2025.

news.summary: In a groundbreaking development on April 8, 2025, Michigan women are now officially permitted to fulfill their aspirations of becoming surrogates. ConceiveAbilities, a leading agency in the field, is delighted to assist these women as they embark on this transformative path. On the very first day, ConceiveAbilities successfully paired a surrogate from Michigan with a local family, marking a significant milestone in the state's surrogacy landscape.
news.headline: Michigan legalizes surrogacy, ConceiveAbilities supports surrogates. First match on day one with a Michigan family.

news.summary: Astound Broadband has recently finished the installation of a 108-mile underground fiber route alongside Highway 6 in Tillamook County, Oregon. This development is set to provide over 270 rural homes with access to high-speed internet for the first time. The newly established fiber route, which was entirely constructed underground, extends from a submarine cable landing station situated south of Pacific City to Hillsboro, traversing through Tillamook. This initiative will facilitate the provision of fiber-based internet services in the region along the highway, an undertaking that had not been possible before.
news.headline: Astound Broadband finishes 108-mile fiber project along Highway 6 in Tillamook, bringing high-speed internet to 270 homes.

news.summary: A dedicated Customer Success Team led by Senior Vice President Andrea Basso at CST is set to provide high-touch service, strategic guidance, and proactive engagement. The announcement was made by XY Retail, a leading global provider of next-generation unified commerce solutions on April 8, 2025, in New York. The team aims to offer personalized support to clients, with a focus on enhancing customer experience and satisfaction.
news.headline: XY Retail launches Customer Success Team to drive retail impact. Led by SVP Andrea Basso, team offers guidance and engagement.

news.summary: Dunn-Edwards Corporation unveiled a new product designed for concrete and wood surfaces on April 8, 2025. The 100% acrylic formula is crafted to endure over time, offering durability and longevity. Known as Porch & Floor Concrete and Wood, this offering is optimized for these materials, ensuring lasting protection and quality.
news.headline: Dunn-Edwards launches new Porch & Floor Coating for concrete and wood, made with 100% acrylic formula. Los Angeles, April 8, 2025.

news.summary: Frisco, Texas-based AI Customer Experience company, Humach, has recently acquired Markets EQ, a company hailing from Albany, New York. Markets EQ is notable for its utilization of AI-powered voice analytics within the realm of finance, particularly on Wall Street. Through this technology, Markets EQ has been able to revolutionize financial communications, offering exclusive data insights from earnings calls and other sources. One of its prominent clients, Ciena Corporation, relies on Markets EQ in their investor relations tasks. This strategic acquisition places Humach in a strong position to expand its offerings and cater to a wider audience in the financial sector.
news.headline: Humach acquires Markets EQ, expanding AI capabilities. Markets EQ brings AI-powered voice analytics to Wall Street.

news.summary: Safe Pro Group Inc. (NASDAQ: SPAI) based in Aventura, Florida, a prominent provider of artificial intelligence (AI)-driven defense and security solutions, has confirmed the successful delivery of its inaugural landmine and unexploded ordnance (UXO) dataset. This delivery, conducted under a contract associated with the US Government, signifies a significant progression for Safe Pro as it ventures into a lucrative revenue channel. The accomplishment demonstrates the company's utilization of extensive real-world datasets and its patented AI platform, Spo.
news.headline: Safe Pro Group Inc. delivered its first landmine and UXO data set under a US Govt contract, entering a new revenue stream.

news.summary: In San Jose, California, on April 8, 2025, Reallusion announced their plans to revolutionize real-time 3D character creation through the release of Character Creator 5 (CC5) in the Summer of 2025. This new version will feature enhanced HD character bases with subdivision support, offering a significant advancement in the field. This update aims to provide users with improved capabilities for character design and creation, promising a more immersive and detailed experience.
news.headline: Reallusion unveils Character Creator 5 in Summer 2025, featuring HD character bases and subdivision support.

news.summary: The US Weather Forecasting System market is projected to grow significantly, reaching USD 832.2 million in 2029 from USD 620.1 million in 2024, with a CAGR of 6.1%. The United States Department of Agriculture predicts a rise in agricultural exports by 2025 due to global economic growth. Advanced technologies in agriculture require accurate weather predictions. The US, having the most airports globally, is upgrading its weather forecasting systems for aviation safety. Key industry players include Vaisala, DTN, Accuweather, The Weather Company, and StormGeo. In 2024, the hardware segment dominated the market, divided into various equipment categories such as barometers, anemometers, and weather radars. This market growth is propelled by the need for precise weather data across industries like aviation, agriculture, and transportation.
news.headline: U.S. Weather Forecasting System market expected to reach $832.2 million by 2029, growing at 6.1% CAGR from $620.1 million in 2024.

news.summary: The Green Construction Market is experiencing growth due to increasing environmental concerns and stricter regulations on energy efficiency. The market is expected to reach USD 375.80 billion in 2025, with a projected CAGR of 11.0%. By 2025, the sustainable building materials segment is set to be valued at US$ 15 billion, online retailing segment at US$ 5.2 billion, and North America at US$ 12.3 billion. The commercial segment is anticipated to dominate the market, driven by businesses investing in sustainable building practices. The growth is attributed to the increasing adoption of eco-friendly construction materials, convenience of purchasing sustainable products online, regulatory frameworks, and incentives for green construction.
news.headline: Green Construction Market set to reach USD 780.72 Billion by 2032, from USD 375.80 Bn in 2025. Key growth factors: Sustainable building materials at US$ 15 billion by 2025, online retailing at US$ 5.2 billion by 2025, and North America valued at US$ 12.3 billion by 2025.
